title: Add regression tests for JSON compatibility and plain output
description: Add/extend command-level tests to verify default JSON behavior remains unchanged and new `--plain` behavior matches format, determinism, and empty-state requirements.
acceptance_criteria: Tests assert `command_bead(... bead_command='list')` still returns JSON output shape compatible with existing behavior.
Tests assert `--plain` output contains required header columns and one row per bead.
Tests assert plain-mode rows are sorted deterministically by `bead_id`.
Tests assert plain-mode empty state outputs `No beads found.` with exit code `0`.
Tests cover missing value rendering as `-` and ensure no extra JSON is printed in plain mode.

handoff_summary.completed: Updated `tests/test_orchestrator.py` to: (1) assert default `command_bead(..., bead_command='list')` returns JSON-compatible bead objects, (2) assert `--plain` output includes required header columns and one row per bead, (3) assert plain rows are deterministically sorted by `bead_id` even if storage returns unsorted beads, (4) assert plain empty state is exactly `No beads found.` with exit code 0, and (5) assert missing values render as `-` and plain mode does not emit JSON payload text. Validation run: `.venv/bin/python -m unittest -q tests.test_orchestrator.OrchestratorTests.test_cli_bead_list_defaults_to_json tests.test_orchestrator.OrchestratorTests.test_cli_bead_list_plain_outputs_headers_rows_and_missing_values tests.test_orchestrator.OrchestratorTests.test_cli_bead_list_plain_rows_are_sorted_by_bead_id tests.test_orchestrator.OrchestratorTests.test_cli_bead_list_plain_empty_state` (pass) and `.venv/bin/python -m unittest -q tests.test_orchestrator` (42 tests, pass).
handoff_summary.risks: Low: plain-output assertions intentionally lock the column contract and non-JSON behavior; intentional CLI format changes will require synchronized test updates.
handoff_summary.next_action: Proceed to downstream review/integration for B0020.
handoff_summary.conflict_risks: Potential conflict if sibling beads also edit list-command tests in `tests/test_orchestrator.py`; merge carefully around the `test_cli_bead_list_*` block.

conflict_risks: Potential conflict if sibling beads also edit list-command tests in `tests/test_orchestrator.py`; merge carefully around the `test_cli_bead_list_*` block.

guardrails.template_text:
# Tester Guardrails

Primary responsibility: Add or update automated tests, run validation, and report defects or missing coverage.

Allowed actions:
- Write or update tests relevant to the assigned bead.
- Run targeted checks and summarize failures clearly.
- Make minimal test-enablement fixes only when strictly necessary to execute or stabilize the tests.

Disallowed actions:
- Implement feature logic beyond minimal test-enablement work.
- Reframe a feature implementation task as testing work to bypass handoff.
- Perform review signoff or broad documentation rewrites.

Expected outputs:
- Completed or blocked JSON describing test coverage, validation status, and follow-up needs.
- Precise defect or coverage notes when the bead cannot be completed within tester scope.
